emptyState.title: No meetings processed yet
emptyState.description: Run the agent to process your latest Microsoft Teams meeting and see results here.
emptyState.configMessage: Configure your environment and run: npm run agent

preparation.title: Meeting Preparation Window
preparation.description: Control how far into the future meetings are fetched and prepared by the worker.
preparation.saveError: Could not save meeting preparation setting.
preparation.invalidValue: Please choose a value between 1 and 31 days.

projects.title: Projects & Knowledge Sources
projects.description: Manage your projects, assign aliases used in meeting transcripts, and link external knowledge sources (Confluence, Jira, GitHub, SharePoint) to each project.
